title: Terms of Use
welcomeMessage: Welcome to the regression therapy website. By using this website and services, you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully.
acceptanceText: By using our website and services, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website or services.
servicesDescription: We provide regression therapy services, which include, but are not limited to:
servicesDisclaimer: Our services do not replace professional medical care, psychiatric treatment, or psychotherapy. If you have serious mental or physical health problems, we recommend consulting with an appropriate medical professional.
appointmentText: Booking for sessions is done through the contact form on our website, by phone, or through the messengers indicated on the site.
paymentText: Payment for services is made according to the rates specified on the site. We reserve the right to change rates, with prior notice on our website.
cancellationText: In case of cancellation of a session booking, please notify us no later than 24 hours before the scheduled time. Otherwise, a cancellation fee may be applied.
confidentialityText: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. Detailed information about how we collect, use, and protect your information can be found in our
intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, audio and video clips, is the property of our company or our licensors and is protected by copyright laws.
intellectualPropertyUsage: You may view and download materials from our website for personal, non-commercial use, provided you retain all copyright and other proprietary notices.
liabilityText: We make every effort to ensure that the information on our website is accurate and up-to-date, but we do not guarantee its completeness or accuracy. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our website or services.
resultsDisclaimer: Results of regression therapy sessions may vary for different people. We do not guarantee specific results from our services.
contraindicationsText: Regression therapy has certain contraindications. Our services are not recommended for individuals with:
contraindication1: Severe mental disorders (schizophrenia, bipolar disorder in acute phase)
contraindication3: State of alcohol or drug intoxication
contraindicationsDisclaimer: If you have doubts about the possibility of undergoing regression therapy, please consult with your doctor or contact us to discuss your situation.
changesText: We reserve the right to change these Terms of Use at any time. Changes take effect after publication on this page. We recommend periodically reviewing these Terms of Use to stay informed of any changes.
contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us:
